title: Weather update: Partial influence of westerly, local winds across country
summary: KATHMANDU, April 20: Currently, there is a partial influence of the westerly and local winds in the country. According to the Weather Forecasting Division of the Department of Hydrology and Meteorology, the weather in Koshi Province, hilly and mountainous regions of other provinces, would remain generally cloudy today. Related story Weather to be clear across the country, three provinces to expe..
content:
KATHMANDU, April 20: Currently, there is a partial influence of the westerly and local winds in the country. According to the Weather Forecasting Division of the Department of Hydrology and Meteorology, the weather in Koshi Province, hilly and mountainous regions of other provinces, would remain generally cloudy today. Related story Weather to be clear across the country, three provinces to expe... Similarly, there is a possibility of light rain accompanied by thunderstorms and lightning as well as snowfall at a few places in the hilly and mountainous areas of the Koshi Province, Bagmati Province, Gandaki Province and Lumbini Province. Likewise, light rainfall along with the thunderstorm and lightning, as well as snowfall, are likely at one or two places in the hilly areas of Karnali Province and Sudurpaschim Province. Later tonight, generally cloudy weather is expected in mountainous regions, partly cloudy weather in the hilly region, and mainly fair weather in the Tarai areas of the country. There is a possibility of light rainfall and snowfall at one or two places in the mountainous region of Koshi Province, Gandaki Province and Karnali Province.
